items.name: veil-rs
items.description: コミットやCI/CDの段階で、機密情報の流出を未然に防ぐ。マイナンバーなど「日本独自のPII」検知に特化した、Rust製・商用グレードの高速セキュリティスキャナ。 / Prevent secret leaks at commit & CI/CD stage. A blazing fast, local-first scanner specialized in Japanese PII (My Number, etc.). Features commercial-grade reporting.

items.name: nosql-sanitize
items.description: nosql-sanitize is a lightweight and blazing-fast suite of tools designed to prevent NoSQL Injection attacks in Node.js applications. It recursively sanitizes user-supplied data to remove characters and patterns (like $ and control characters) used in malicious MongoDB queries.
